children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established in the Treasury a revolving fund for duplication and delivery services provided by the Librarian of Congress (hereafter in sections 182a to 182d of this title referred to as the “Librarian”) which are associated with the national audiovisual conservation center established under the Act entitled “An Act to authorize acquisition of certain real property for the Library of Congress, and for other purposes”, approved (; note).December 15, 1997Public Law 105–1442 U.S.C. 141

children.heading: Fees for services
children.label: b Fees for services
children.text: The Librarian may charge a fee for providing services described in subsection (a), and shall deposit any such fees charged into the revolving fund under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under subsection (b).

children.label: B
children.text: Any other amounts received by the Librarian which are attributable to the services described in subsection (a).

children.label: C
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under paragraph (2).

children.label: D
children.text: Such other amounts as may be appropriated under law.

children.label: A
children.text: Any obligated, unexpended balances existing as of the date of the transfer which are attributable to the services described in subsection (a).

children.label: i
children.text: the total value of the supplies, inventories, equipment, gift fund balances, and other assets attributable to such services; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total value of the liabilities attributable to such services.

children.heading: Use of amounts in fund
children.label: d Use of amounts in fund
children.text: Amounts in the revolving fund under this section shall be available to the Librarian, in amounts specified in appropriations Acts and without fiscal year limitation, to carry out the services described in subsection (a).
